name: Mrs Mollie
description: Coastal Mollie is a female Flareon who's is 38 years old. She is a very gentle Flareon who is happy and cheerful at times. She is also the long-lost mother of three kids, Speed the Jolteon, Crystal the Vaporeon, and Solarflare the Flareon. Mollie was originally going to name her kids Red, Blue, and Green, but she never got the chance to since she lost the eggs before they hatched, due to an accident that happened to her and her family involving a berserk Rhydon that happened 12 years ago, losing her husband and Older brother.
creator: GamerBunny67XD
